'''radhuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kachnar|kachnar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kachnar|kachnar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| radhuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhizhith|rædhizhith]] || [[word:rædhizhij|rædhizhij]] || [[word:rædhizhish|rædhizhish]] || [[word:rædhizhi|rædhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhudhuzhuth|radhudhuzhuth]] || [[word:radhudhuzhuj|radhudhuzhuj]] || [[word:radhudhuzhush|radhudhuzhush]] || [[word:radhudhuzhu|radhudhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhuzhuth|radhuzhuth]] || [[word:radhuzhuj|radhuzhuj]] || [[word:radhuzhush|radhuzhush]] || [[word:radhuzhu|radhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhufzhuth|radhufzhuth]] || [[word:radhufzhuj|radhufzhuj]] || [[word:radhufzhush|radhufzhush]] || [[word:radhufzhuf|radhufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhuzhuthu|radhuzhuthu]] || [[word:radhuzhuju|radhuzhuju]] || [[word:radhuzhushu|radhuzhushu]] || [[word:radhuzhuku|radhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhuzhuth|radhuzhuth]] || [[word:radhuzhuj|radhuzhuj]] || [[word:radhuzhush|radhuzhush]] || [[word:radhuzhu|radhuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhuzhuthul|radhuzhuthul]] || [[word:radhuzhujul|radhuzhujul]] || [[word:radhuzhushul|radhuzhushul]] || [[word:radhuzhukul|radhuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhuzhuthuthu|radhuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:radhuzhujuju|radhuzhujuju]] || [[word:radhuzhushushu|radhuzhushushu]] || [[word:radhuzhuku|radhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhuzhuthun|radhuzhuthun]] || [[word:radhuzhujun|radhuzhujun]] || [[word:radhuzhushun|radhuzhushun]] || [[word:radhuzhukun|radhuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhuzhuthuoro|radhuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:radhuzhujuoro|radhuzhujuoro]] || [[word:radhuzhushuoro|radhuzhushuoro]] || [[word:radhuzhukuoro|radhuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
